ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Sep-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurence Blau appeared by zoom for Donna Federico (Proposed Administrator).

The Court noted that Marie Federico (Decedent's Mother) who has higher priority to serve has received notice and that no objections have been received from her. Mr. Blau stated that he is not aware of any objections. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Donna Federico is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond in the amount of $1,150,000.00 is required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Blau that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed one week before the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2020 Continued To Dec-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
